title: Caesar AI Legal & Governance Case Atlas — Private Candidate Review Intake Schema

source_run_id.description: The green source run ID that discovered the candidate signal.

source_signal_id.description: ID of the source candidate signal.

candidate_hash.description: Deterministic dedupe hash of the candidate signal.

source_id.description: Identifier of the source in source-registry.

source_name.description: Display name of the observation source.

detected_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of original discovery.

signal_summary.description: Caesar-native metadata-based summary of the signal.

keyword_group_hits.description: Keyword groups triggered in this intake signal.

suggested_failure_modes.description: Suggested failure modes mapping to the Caesar taxonomy.

suggested_control_themes.description: Suggested control themes mapping to the Caesar taxonomy.

suggested_vendor_questions.description: Short, Caesar-native suggested vendor compliance questions.

review_status.description: Default status in draft workflow. Must be 'needs_review'.

human_review_required.description: Boolean flag indicating human review is mandatory. Must be true.

public_publish_ready.description: Boolean flag blocking automated public publication. Must be false.

raw_text_stored.description: Indicates if raw full third-party text is stored. Must be false.

html_stored.description: Indicates if raw third-party HTML body is stored. Must be false.

remote_write_attempted.description: Indicates if a live remote db write occurred. Must be false.

public_site_mutated.description: Indicates if public site pages were changed. Must be false.

promotion_packet_created.description: Indicates if promotion packet files were created. Must be false.

public_preview_created.description: Indicates if public web previews were created. Must be false.
